conditions.name: Type 2 Diabetes
conditions.content_angle: weight loss reverses T2D in many cases, carb management, GLP-1 drugs

conditions.name: PCOS (Polycystic Ovary Syndrome)
conditions.content_angle: insulin resistance root cause, specific food approach, inositol evidence

conditions.name: Hypothyroidism
conditions.content_angle: realistic expectations with treated vs untreated thyroid, selenium, iodine, diet

conditions.name: Insulin Resistance
conditions.content_angle: connection to belly fat, reversibility with diet, berberine evidence

conditions.name: Sleep Apnea and Weight Loss
conditions.content_angle: weight causes sleep apnea and vice versa — breaking the cycle, CPAP and weight

conditions.name: Depression and Weight Loss
conditions.content_angle: safe messaging, medication effects on weight, exercise as adjunct treatment
conditions.safety_note: Sensitive content — always recommend professional support

conditions.name: Metabolic Syndrome
conditions.content_angle: cluster of risk factors, lifestyle as primary treatment

conditions.name: Binge Eating Disorder (BED)
conditions.content_angle: mental health condition first — professional treatment required, not a diet problem
conditions.safety_note: Always recommend professional treatment — do not provide restriction advice

conditions.name: Arthritis and Weight Loss
conditions.content_angle: weight as joint load, low-impact exercise, anti-inflammatory diet, pain management

conditions.name: Fatty Liver (NAFLD) and Weight Loss
conditions.weight_loss_benefit: primary treatment — even 5-10% weight loss helps
conditions.content_angle: diet approach, avoiding fructose, exercise importance

conditions.name: Weight Loss with Heart Disease
conditions.content_angle: cardiac rehab, safe exercise, Mediterranean diet, working with cardiologist

conditions.name: Fibromyalgia and Weight Loss
conditions.content_angle: pain-limited exercise, anti-inflammatory diet, sleep improvement

conditions.name: Lipedema
conditions.content_angle: often misdiagnosed as obesity, not responsive to standard weight loss, lymphatic care
